articles.title: 'Everyone at Man Utd loves him' - Owen backs Carrick for job
articles.summary: Michael Owen says he "can't believe people are questioning" whether Michael Carrick should become the permanent manager of Manchester United.

articles.title: No fear - so can Man Utd finally overcome nemesis Chelsea?
articles.summary: Manchester United have not enjoyed recent finals against Chelsea, but can they finally overcome their nemesis in Sunday's Women's League Cup final?

articles.title: Time to target Brentford, Liverpool and Fulham stars? FPL talking point
articles.summary: With gameweek 32 emerging as a popular point to wildcard for Fantasy Premier League managers, there's a chance to make short-term gains by targeting teams with good fixtures in weeks 30 and 31.

articles.title: From Norfolk to La Masia - Tavares is 'England's one to watch'
articles.summary: Family, ex-coaches and former team-mates of Ajay Tavares describe the 16-year-old's rise from a small Norfolk market town to FC Barcelona.

articles.title: Football Daily
articles.summary: Kelly Somers speaks to Brentford and Republic of Ireland captain Nathan Collins.

articles.title: How to follow the Premier League on the BBC this week

articles.title: Why are there two 5.30pm Premier League kick-offs on Saturday?

articles.title: Fastest to 100 wins - Europa specialist Emery sets Villa record
articles.summary: Unai Emery becomes the quickest of the three Aston Villa managers to reach 100 victories as his side defeat Lille in the Europa League last 16.

articles.title: Sutton's predictions v YouTuber Angry Ginge
articles.summary: BBC Sport football expert Chris Sutton takes on YouTuber Angry Ginge plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for this weekend's Premier League fixtures on Tuesday, Wednesday and Thursday.

articles.title: From best in league to bench - Foden's mysterious loss of form
articles.summary: Analysing the reasons that playmaker Phil Foden has started only four of Manchester City's past 12 games.

articles.title: How are Tudor's tactics hurting Spurs?
articles.summary: BBC football tactics correspondent Umir Irfan looks at how Tottenham interim manager Igor Tudor's tactical principles could be the reason behind their poor run of form.

articles.title: How Wrexham are getting 'Premier League ready'
articles.summary: After three successive promotions for Wrexham, CEO Michael Williamson explains how the club are preparing for the next decade.

articles.title: 'I've learned a lot' - Rutter on Brighton boss Hurzeler
articles.summary: Forward Georginio Rutter discusses "very young" Brighton manager Fabian Hurzeler and says that despite his tender age, the German has plenty of football knowledge to pass on.

articles.title: 'He's lost the changing room' - Warnock on Tudor
articles.summary: Champions League Match of the Day pundit Stephen Warnock believes Tottenham manager Igor Tudor has "lost the changing room" after their 5-2 defeat to Atletico Madrid in the last 16.

articles.title: Reiten leaves Chelsea after 13 trophies in six years
articles.summary: Guro Reiten leaves Chelsea after winning 13 trophies in six years to join American side Gotham FC.

articles.title: Itauma looks set to challenge for a world heavyweight title this year
articles.summary: Moses Itauma looks set to fight for a heavyweight world championship in 2026.

articles.title: Parker says Burnley's season 'could be seen as a failure'
articles.summary: Burnley manager Scott Parker says this season "might be seen as a failure" with relegation looking likely, but has said he wants to focus on the "bigger picture".
